title: Cygnus's Pride Flag Totems
description: Cygnus's Pride Flag Totems is a resource pack which adds custom flag models for renamed totems of undying.
body:
### Description

Cygnus's Pride Flag Totems is a resource pack which adds custom flag models for renamed totems of undying.

### How do I use it?

Using this resource pack is simple! Just put a totem of undying into an anvil and rename it to include the name of the flag you want (See below image). A list of every flag name is below, and all the models can be seen in the gallery tab.

**FOR 1.20.6 AND PRIOR:** This resource pack requires the use of [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or OptiFine when using any version before 1.21.5. Attempting to use this resource pack without one of them will result in a regular totem texture for renamed totems.

![Screenshot of a Minecraft anvil GUI. There is a totem of undying in the first slot on the left, and a progress pride flag in the output slot. The item is being renamed "progress".](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/IZASaD0g/images/aeab3efebe6d31f44078dfa29148f3d1f24d37cc.png)

### Flag Names
 - aroace
 - aromantic
 - asexual
 - bisexual
 - gay
 - intersex
 - lesbian
 - nonbinary
 - pansexual
 - progress
 - queer
 - transgender

### Video Showcase
